entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems dedicated to conducting research in agriculture to improve food security and poverty alleviation

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: POVERTY ALLEVIATION
entities.description: The process of reducing the number of people living in poverty

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in the production of agricultural goods and services over time

entities.name: GREEN REVOLUTION TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: A set of research-based agricultural technologies including high-yielding varieties and chemical fertilizers

entities.name: FOOD PRICES
entities.description: The cost of food products in the market

entities.name: POVERTY REDUCTION
entities.description: The act of decreasing the prevalence of poverty within a population

entities.name: MILLENNIUM DEVELOPMENT GOALS (MDGS)
entities.description: Eight international development goals established by the United Nations

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the Green Revolution had a significant impact on agriculture

entities.name: PUBLIC POLICIES
entities.description: Governmental actions and regulations designed to achieve specific social or economic goals

entities.name: INSTITUTIONS
entities.description: Organized bodies or systems that establish rules and facilitate agricultural activities

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural production carried out by farmers with small landholdings

entities.name: PRIVATIZATION
entities.description: The transfer of ownership, property, or business from the government to the private sector

entities.name: GLOBALIZATION
entities.description: The process of interaction and integration among people, companies, and governments worldwide

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL AGREEMENTS ON TRADE
entities.description: Treaties and accords between nations regarding the exchange of goods and services

entities.name: EXCHANGE OF RESOURCES
entities.description: The movement of agricultural and financial resources between entities or nations

entities.name: PROPERTY RIGHTS
entities.description: Legal rights to the ownership and use of land and resources

entities.name: MARKET ORIENTATION
entities.description: The degree to which agricultural production is geared towards market demand

entities.name: INPUT AND SERVICE DELIVERY SYSTEMS
entities.description: The mechanisms through which farmers access seeds, fertilizers, and technical advice

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE USE OF NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: The management of natural resources to meet current needs without compromising future generations

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Domesticated animals raised in an agricultural setting to produce labor and commodities

entities.name: HORTICULTURE
entities.description: The art or practice of garden cultivation and management

entities.name: AGRO-PROCESSING
entities.description: The transformation of raw agricultural products into value-added products

entities.name: INDIAN COUNCIL OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH (ICAR)
entities.description: The national agricultural research system of India

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL CROPS RESEARCH INSTITUTE FOR THE SEMI-ARID TROPICS (ICRISAT)
entities.description: An international research organization focusing on semi-arid tropical regions

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SCIENCE
entities.description: The study of agricultural processes and techniques
